title: Infusion Table
description: Infusion Table give player possibility to rip enchantment from item into book.
body:
[![Fabric API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jptrzy/infusion-table-mod/1.17.1/Images/fabric-api-badge-lanczos.webp)](https://minecraft.curseforge.com/projects/fabric-api)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/i-Hb81RSl14" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 📖 About
Infusion Table gives player the possibility to rip enchantment from an item into a book.

You can download the mod on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/infusion-table), [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/infusion-table), or in the [releases tab](https://github.com/jptrzy/infusion-table-mod/releases) on Github.

### ‍🍳 Recipe
![Infusion Table Crafting Recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jptrzy/infusion-table-mod/1.18/Images/recipe.webp)

### 💡 Origins
It's based on an idea from [System Zee video](https://youtu.be/sytNTbaksSE).

## 📝 How to use it?
1. You need to craft **Infusion Table** and place it.
2. Place book on to it.
3. Place enchanted item that you want to take off enchantment **(past the process it will vanish)**.
4. Use **Flint and Steel** on it and watch the show.
